options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Use a more verbose output
Available commands:
cecilfy              Migrates a .NET assembly to AndroidX.
compare              Compares two .NET assemblies or XML API info files.
deptree              Create a dependency tree of NuGet packages.
generate             Generates the complete AndroidX mapping file.
jetify               Migrates a Java .aar or .jar file to AndroidX.
merge                Merges various .NET assemlies into a single file.
search               Search artifacts in directories for Java classes.
